payload.answer: Brain should enforce select-only mode by accepting the SELECT query and rejecting any DELETE attempt with an access_denied error. No memory mutations should occur from denied operations.
citations: Access control rule: SELECT permitted, DELETE denied

entity_resolution.reason: Fixture defines explicit access control; no ambiguous entity references present

payload.intent: Evaluate Brain memory system behavior under SQL select-only access control

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL mode restricts operations to SELECT queries only; DELETE operations are denied
SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is a valid permitted operation under this fixture

details: No memory state changes required for this evaluation

repair_options: If DELETE is attempted: return error 'Operation denied: DELETE not permitted in select-only mode'
If SELECT succeeds: return result set without side effects
Audit log the access attempt for compliance review
